allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "where ssh-keygen & where ssh & where scp" 2>&1)

Bash(SSH_ASKPASS=/tmp/ssh_pass_helper.sh DISPLAY=:0 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes -o PubkeyAuthentication=no root@8.134.168.87 "
node --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO NODE'
npm --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO NPM'
pm2 --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO PM2'
git --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO GIT'
ls /root/ 2>/dev/null
ss -tlnp | grep -E '3000|3001|3002|8080|8888' 2>/dev/null || netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep -E '3000|3001|3002|8080'
" 2>&1)

Bash(SSH_ASKPASS=/tmp/ssh_pass_helper.sh DISPLAY=:0 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes -o PubkeyAuthentication=no root@8.134.168.87 "
cd /root/louis-zz
git pull origin main 2>&1
" 2>&1)

Bash(SSH_ASKPASS=/tmp/ssh_pass_helper.sh DISPLAY=:0 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes -o PubkeyAuthentication=no root@8.134.168.87 "
cd /root/louis-zz/client
npm ci 2>&1 | tail -3
npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5
" 2>&1)

Bash(SSH_ASKPASS=/tmp/ssh_pass_helper.sh DISPLAY=:0 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes -o PubkeyAuthentication=no root@8.134.168.87 "
cd /root/louis-zz
git pull origin main 2>&1 | tail -5
cd client && npm ci --silent 2>/dev/null && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -3
cd ../server && npm ci --omit=dev --silent 2>/dev/null
cd .. && pm2 restart room-game 2>&1 | grep -E 'online|error'
" 2>&1)

Bash(SSH_ASKPASS=/tmp/ssh_pass_helper.sh DISPLAY=:0 SSH_ASKPASS_REQUIRE=force ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@8.134.168.87 "cd /root/louis-zz && git reset --hard HEAD && git pull origin main && cd client && npm run build && pm2 restart room-game")

Bash(SSH_ASKPASS=/tmp/ssh_pass_helper.sh DISPLAY=:0 SSH_ASKPASS_REQUIRE=force ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@8.134.168.87 "cd /root/louis-zz && git reset --hard HEAD && git pull origin main && pm2 restart room-game")
